use_cases: Landing page hero sections with immersive particle animations
Interactive portfolio showcases with cursor-driven effects
SaaS product pages with engaging visual storytelling
Creative agency websites with digital art aesthetics
ai_summary: An animated hero section featuring a grid of particles that respond to cursor movement and auto-animate when idle. The component creates a mesmerizing 'Digital Inferno' effect with FLUX branding, combining dark aesthetics with glowing particle trails and interactive cursor tracking. Includes customizable title, subtitle, description, and dual CTA buttons with hover states.
